name: Planet, Inc.
summary: Planet, Inc. provides electronic data interchange (EDI) services for raw materials suppliers, CPG/OTC manufacturers, wholesalers, and retailers in Japan. The company offers EDI for enterprise systems, procurement/Web-EDI/MITEOS, etc.; location database, CPG and OTC product database, OTC medicines instructions database, product master registration support services, etc.; and product lookup/trend markets/business navigator, etc., which enables the perusal of data, including product information, industry news, and the campaigns of various companies. Planet, Inc. was founded in 1985 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
